name: @bytedance-dev/iconpark-skill
description: IconPark 图标命名与分组推荐本地 Skill，纯文本分析，零第三方依赖

scripts.prepublishOnly: node scripts/sync-version.cjs && node -e "if (!require('child_process').execSync('git tag --points-at HEAD',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim()) { console.warn('⚠ 当前 HEAD 无 git tag, 确认 `npm version patch` 跑过?'); process.exit(1); }"
